case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JULIO TANAKA JR.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JULIO TANAKA JR. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT- UNABLE TO FORWARD -
